calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:19am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant appears through counsel Philip Keith with Francine Perkins. Respondent, Cynthia Miller appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

Appellants call Alberto Rodriguez as a witness.

10:04am
Matter is submitted. Ms. Miller submits a change of address to the clerk in open court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Judgment Entered
